visual_questions: Are all 20 regular tiles visually distinct from each other when viewed side by side?
Is each tile's subject clearly readable at a simulated 128x128px display size?
Does each tile silhouette remain distinguishable when mentally downscaled to 32x32px?
Do all tiles display hand-drawn watercolor style (not photorealistic, not pixel art)?
Are tiles appropriately desaturated for Ch1 (s0 stage: 8-15% saturation, warm undertone preserved)?
Is the subject centered in the tile canvas with no apparent cropping at edges?
Are outlines present and clearly not pure black (should be colored, darkened hue)?
tasks.acceptance_criteria: See asset-acceptance-criteria.md Section 一 and JSON asset_family=tileset

visual_questions: Does tile_wave_block display visible concentric ring ripple pattern in teal-cyan (#7ECDE8)?
Does tile_light_chain_block display gold chain link pattern with sakura pink base?
Does tile_pierce_block display a single directional arrow (the ONLY tile with a direction indicator)?
Does tile_swap_block display bidirectional swap arrows on a golden-yellow (#F5C842) base?
Does tile_cascade_block display sequential step dots/chain pattern on dark forest green (#4A6D9A)?
Do all 5 special tiles look clearly different from each other AND from the 20 regular tiles?
Do any of the special tile motifs (rings, chains, arrows, sequential dots) appear on regular tiles?
tasks.acceptance_criteria: See asset-acceptance-criteria.md Section 一 Special Blocks table and JSON special_blocks criteria

visual_questions: For each of the 7 characters: does the same character look like the same person across all 5 expressions?
For char_ritsu: disheveled dark hair, light blue-grey shirt, generally casual posture?
For char_hinata: sakura pink (#F0C4C4) in costume, notebook implied or visible?
For char_kenzo: fisherman vest in deep sea blue, grey sparse hair, weathered stocky face?
For char_umeko: green pottery apron (#7DBE77), hair bun, slight work-forward posture?
For char_natsuka: deep green outdoor vest (#3D6645), windswept free hair, head tilt?
For char_fuyuko: night blue kimono-style top (#2A4060), neat upswept white/grey hair, upright dignified posture?
For char_gicho: clearly an orange tabby cat with navy collar (#2A3650)?
Is happy clearly different from default (smile/eye-crinkle visible)?
Is thinking clearly different from default (head tilt or finger gesture)?
Is surprised clearly different from happy (wide eyes, open mouth or raised brow)?
Is react_jump clearly energetic/dynamic, different from surprised?
Is the art style hand-drawn watercolor for all 35 expressions?
tasks.acceptance_criteria: See asset-acceptance-criteria.md Section 二 and JSON asset_family=character_expression

visual_questions: Does each portrait show the face + shoulders (not wider body, not just face)?
Is the face centered horizontally in each portrait?
Is the top of the head visible and not cropped?
Are the shoulders visible at the lower portion of the frame?
Is the character identifiable in each portrait (matching their expression-set identity)?
For char_fuyuko_portrait_react_jump (512x512) vs char_fuyuko_portrait_default (1024x1024): does the different source size produce a different crop or composition?
For char_hinata_portrait_happy (512x512) vs char_hinata_portrait_default (1024x1024): same question — does crop or composition differ?
Is the art style consistent (watercolor) across all 10 portraits?
tasks.acceptance_criteria: See asset-acceptance-criteria.md Section 三 and JSON asset_family=portrait

contract_refs: .allforai/game-design/art/asset-acceptance-criteria.md#四、帧动画（char_gicho Frame Animation）验收标准
visual_questions: IDLE LOOP (f01-f04): Do the 4 idle frames form a smooth breathing loop? Is f04 similar enough to f01 to loop without a visible pop?
IDLE: Is there visible subtle motion between idle frames (slight up/down or pose variation)?
HAPPY (f01-f04): Is there visible happy/bouncy motion progression across the 4 happy frames?
HAPPY vs IDLE: Are the happy frames clearly different from the idle frames (more energy, visible smile/expression)?
WAVE (f01-f04): Is the paw/arm wave motion arc clearly visible and progressing across all 4 wave frames?
SURPRISED (f01-f03): Is the surprise escalating across 3 frames (widening eyes, body reaction)?
IDENTITY: Is the orange tabby cat with dark navy collar consistently identifiable across all 15 frames?
Are there any frames where the cat's appearance changes drastically (different fur color, different body proportion)?
tasks.acceptance_criteria: See asset-acceptance-criteria.md Section 四 and JSON asset_family=animation

visual_questions: Do the tile and character assets feel like they belong to the same world and art style?
Is the hand-drawn watercolor aesthetic consistent across tile, expression, portrait, and animation families?
Do the color palettes feel harmonious (warm pastels) across all asset types?
Would tiles and characters look visually coherent placed together on a game board?
Does any asset family feel like it belongs to a different art style or game?
tasks.acceptance_criteria: See asset-acceptance-criteria.md Global Style Rules and visual-style-tokens.json
